read_list_generic_ai_extract_list_run_js.query: {"pageScope":"http://127.0.0.1:8787","profile":"list","scope":"page","model":"gpt-5.2","fallbackModel":"gpt-5-mini","promptVersion":4,"temperature":0,"htmlMaxLen":80000,"retryMax":2,"codeMaxChars":12000,"codeMaxLines":260,"repeatPatternLimit":12,"verifyEnabled":true,"verifyMaxCycles":3,"verifyModel":"gpt-5-mini","verifyFallbackModel":"gpt-4.1","verifyPromptVersion":1,"query":"编写一个只读函数，从当前网页提取通用 list（搜索结果/文章列表/消息列表/用户列表）。函数签名 function(config)。严格禁止：导航跳转、网络请求、DOM 修改、事件触发。优先识别主内容区域中“重复出现的条目容器”作为候选列表，再逐条抽取。强制排除：header/nav/footer/sidebar、登录/注册、隐私条款、帮助反馈、广告推荐位。返回对象必须是 {action:'list',items:Array,nextCursor:string|null,pageUrl:string}。items 每项至少提供 url/title/summary 三个字符串字段（缺失填空字符串，不要 null），url 优先绝对地址，最多 50 条。对 Google/Bing/百度/小红书等页面，优先真实结果卡片，避免站点导航链接。关键要求：必须理解并应用 config.target（{by,query,selector,pick}）语义；当给出 target.query/selector 时应优先在该目标范围提取列表；当给出 target.pick 时，按 pick 规则（number=第N个，-1最后一个，string=文本包含）选择条目。若 config.query/searchQuery 存在，也需结合其语义缩小目标。config 还包括 minItems/fields/requireFields/filter/sort/output。"}

read_reactions_generic_extract_codegen_r.query: {"pageScope":"http://127.0.0.1:8787","profile":"comments","scope":"page","model":"gpt-5.2","fallbackModel":"gpt-5-mini","promptVersion":4,"temperature":0,"htmlMaxLen":80000,"retryMax":2,"codeMaxChars":12000,"codeMaxLines":260,"repeatPatternLimit":12,"verifyEnabled":true,"verifyMaxCycles":3,"verifyModel":"gpt-5-mini","verifyFallbackModel":"gpt-4.1","verifyPromptVersion":1,"query":"编写一个只读函数，从当前网页提取单个对象的互动数据。函数签名必须是 function(config)。严格禁止：导航跳转、网络请求、DOM 修改、事件触发。优先使用 config.target（selector/query）限定提取范围；未提供时在页面主内容区域提取。返回对象必须是 {action:'reactions',data:{likes:string,comments:string,shares:string,favorites:string,views:string,upvotes:string,downvotes:string,pageUrl:string}}。缺失字段填空字符串，不要 null。若遇到 1.2k/9.8万 等格式，保留原始字符串。"}

webchat_core_get_messages_extract_run_js.query: {"pageScope":"http://127.0.0.1:8787","profile":"list","scope":"page","model":"gpt-5.2","fallbackModel":"gpt-5-mini","promptVersion":4,"temperature":0,"htmlMaxLen":80000,"retryMax":2,"codeMaxChars":12000,"codeMaxLines":260,"repeatPatternLimit":12,"verifyEnabled":true,"verifyMaxCycles":3,"verifyModel":"gpt-5-mini","verifyFallbackModel":"gpt-4.1","verifyPromptVersion":1,"query":"编写一个只读函数，签名必须是 function(config)。任务：从当前聊天页面提取消息列表，返回 {action:'getMessages',items:Array,cursor:string}. 绝对禁止：导航跳转、网络请求、DOM写入、事件触发。优先使用语义标记：data-role='message'、data-message-role、[role='listitem'] 等；每条消息输出对象字段 {id,role,text,time,status,index}，全部是字符串或数字（id/role/text/time/status 为字符串，index 为数字）。role 仅可为 user|assistant|system|tool|unknown。如果拿不到稳定 id，使用 role+index+text 前缀组合生成。去掉纯空白消息。按页面展示顺序输出（旧->新）。根据 config.limit 截断末尾 N 条（默认 50）。cursor 可用最后一条消息 id；没有则空字符串。config 包含 {limit,session}."}
